name: San Diego Unified School District
about: San Diego Unified School District is the second largest school district in California, serving approximately 95,500 students in San Diego.
calendarNotes: San Diego Unified starts the school year in mid-August and generally follows a calendar similar to LAUSD, though specific dates differ each year. Spring Break typically falls in late March or early April. San Diego's mild climate means weather-related school closures are extremely rare — unlike many other parts of the country, the calendar is highly reliable once published. The district observes Cesar Chavez Day as a school holiday. Families considering cross-border trips to Tijuana or Baja California during Spring Break should note that Mexican schools follow a different academic calendar with different break timing. The district's proximity to military installations means a notable share of families are active-duty or veterans — mid-year enrollment transfers are common.
